whatsNew.title: Version history
whatsNew.summary: Every trail edit is now versioned — browse the full history of changes and restore any previous version.

whatsNew.title: Sign in with Google
whatsNew.summary: You can now sign in with your Google account in addition to Strava.

whatsNew.title: OpenStreetMap edit mode
whatsNew.summary: Switch the basemap to OpenStreetMap while editing so you can align trail lines to detailed street and path data.
Trail details now appear inside Strava route builder via the Chrome extension (review pending).

upcoming.summary: Strava API Key updates: We need a higher user limit
We’re planning a tutorials hub so you can learn the app from short videos inside Trail Overlay.
